Manage pending decisions across conversations

positional arguments:
  {create,list,get,resolve,expire,cancel}
                        Available commands
    create              Create a new pending decision
    list                List decisions
    get                 Get decision by ID
    resolve             Resolve a pending decision
    expire              Expire old decisions
    cancel              Cancel a pending decision

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
